SEARCH
Package org.skeleton

Class Inventory

java.lang.Object
org.skeleton.Inventory
public class Inventory extends Object
Represents the inventory of a snowplow or player. Stores plow heads and resources like salt, kerosene, and gravel.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Inventory()
    Constructs a new empty inventory with initialized resources.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addGravel(int amount)
    Increases the amount of gravel in the inventory.
    void
    addHead(PlowHead h)
    Adds a plow head to the inventory.
    void
    addKerosene(int amount)
    Increases the amount of kerosene in the inventory.
    void
    addResource(Resource type, int amount)
    Adds a specified resource to the inventory.
    void
    addSalt(int amount)
    Increases the amount of salt in the inventory.
    boolean
    consumeGravel()
    Consumes one unit of gravel if available.
    boolean
    consumeKerosene()
    Consumes one unit of kerosene if available.
    boolean
    consumeSalt()
    Consumes one unit of salt if available.
    void
    removeHead(PlowHead h)
    Removes a plow head from the inventory.

  • Constructor Details

    • Inventory

      public Inventory()
      Constructs a new empty inventory with initialized resources.

  • Method Details

    • addHead

      public void addHead(PlowHead h)
      Adds a plow head to the inventory.
      Parameters:
      h - The plow head to add.

    • removeHead

      public void removeHead(PlowHead h)
      Removes a plow head from the inventory.
      Parameters:
      h - The plow head to remove.

    • consumeSalt

      public boolean consumeSalt()
      Consumes one unit of salt if available.
      Returns:
      true if salt was consumed, false otherwise.

    • consumeKerosene

      public boolean consumeKerosene()
      Consumes one unit of kerosene if available.
      Returns:
      true if kerosene was consumed, false otherwise.

    • consumeGravel

      public boolean consumeGravel()
      Consumes one unit of gravel if available.
      Returns:
      true if gravel was consumed, false otherwise.

    • addResource

      public void addResource(Resource type, int amount)
      Adds a specified resource to the inventory.
      Parameters:
      type - The type of resource to add.
      amount - The amount to add.

    • addSalt

      public void addSalt(int amount)
      Increases the amount of salt in the inventory.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of salt to add.

    • addKerosene

      public void addKerosene(int amount)
      Increases the amount of kerosene in the inventory.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of kerosene to add.

    • addGravel

      public void addGravel(int amount)
      Increases the amount of gravel in the inventory.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of gravel to add.
